title: Awaitable method should be preferred
description: Using a synchronous method instead of its asynchronous counterpart in an async method blocks the execution and is considered bad practice for several reasons: Each thread consumes system resources, such as memory. When a thread is blocked, it’s not doing any useful work, but it’s still consuming these resources. This can lead to inefficient use of system resources.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Awaitable method should be preferred. Use 'await' instead of '.Result' to avoid blocking.
Awaitable method should be preferred. Use 'await' instead of '.Wait()' to avoid blocking.
Awaitable method should be preferred. Use 'await' instead of '.GetAwaiter().GetResult()' to avoid blocking.
